name: Mumbai
key_planning_challenge: Peninsula constraints, intense density, flood risk, and transport demand require vertical redevelopment and resilient coastal planning.
expansion_constraint: Arabian Sea, mangroves, flood-prone lowlands, rail corridor pressure

historical_snapshots.key_event: Port and textile city expands northward
Suburban rail corridors carry rapid growth
Service economy and informal settlement pressure intensify
Metro and coastal infrastructure planning scale up
Redevelopment, flood resilience, and transit expansion dominate
